context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the elixir-essentials instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill before writing ANY `.ex` or `.exs` file.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use pattern matching over if/else** for control flow and data extraction

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `@impl true`** before every callback function (mount, handle_event, handle_info, etc.)

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Produce `{:ok, result} | {:error, reason}` tuples** for fallible operations

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `with` for 2+ sequential fallible operations** instead of nested case

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use the pipe operator** for 2+ chained transformations

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Never nest if/else statements** — use case, cond, or multi-clause functions

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `?` suffix for predicate functions**, `!` suffix for dangerous functions

checklist.name: instruction-9
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Never write defensive code for impossible states** — let it crash

checklist.name: instruction-10
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `@doc` and `@moduledoc`** for all public APIs
